text:
Created attachment 212712
findomain-1.4.3.diff

Changes:
	* Bump DISTVERSION to 1.4.3, update distinfo and CARGO_CRATES
	  dependency list;
	* Update 'files/patch-Cargo.toml'.

Testing:

	  application works as expected (logs attached).
